name: TotalEnergies SE
description: TotalEnergies SE is a global multi-energy company that produces and markets energies on a worldwide scale, including oil and biofuels, natural gas and green gases, renewables, and electricity. Headquartered in Courbevoie, France, the company is committed to providing affordable, clean, and reliable energy to as many people as possible. With operations in over 130 countries, TotalEnergies is actively transitioning its business model to become a major player in the energy transition, aiming to reach net-zero emissions by 2050 while maintaining its position as one of the world's largest integrated energy producers.
